response.justification: Szabo demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and is currently contributing to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, which is directly relevant. However, he falls significantly short on a core requirement: 8+ years developing AI-driven solutions. His resume shows only ~1-2 months of explicit AI/agent work, and critical technologies like Python, vector databases, and RAG architectures are absent entirely. He could be a strong cultural and technical fit if his recent AI work is deeper than presented, but requires substantive follow-up on AI expertise.
strengths: Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, directly aligned with the role
Extensive TypeScript expertise and proven staff-level leadership across multiple companies with mentorship experience
Strong full-stack and infrastructure background, including AWS CDK and DevOps (Docker, CI/CD, Kubernetes)
concerns: Python is not mentioned in skills or experience despite being a core required language for AI systems
No evidence of 8+ years developing AI-driven solutions; current AI work began only 1-2 months ago in April 2025
Missing expertise in critical GenAI technologies: vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM frameworks, and prompt optimization

key_factors.factor: AI experience gap (1-2 years vs 8+ required)
Current AI-agent infrastructure role at re:cinq
Missing Python and GenAI tech stack (vector DB, RAG, LLMs)
